content: Bun native test runner (bun test) is incompatible with @testing-library/react v16 which calls beforeAll at module level. Solution: use @testing-library/react/pure imports + jsdom preload (bunfig.toml preload array) to get React component testing with bun test.

name: github-panel-composition
description: GithubPanel composes 5 subcomponents (ActivityTimeline, CommitList, ContributionHeatmap, RepoFilter, StatsHeader). @tanstack/react-virtual for lists >50 items. Octicons from @primer/octicons-react. Event color map in eventStyle.ts keyed as 'EventType_action'. WS client in api/ws.ts with channel subscription + auto-reconnect.
